title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report April 16 2026
section_path: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report April 16 2026
section_path_text: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report April 16 2026
summary:
Main
Today DCE iron ore futures exhibited a robust trajectory today, with the most active I2609 contract ultimately setiling at782 RMB per tonne, representing an increase of 3.10 per cent from the previous trading session. Physical spot prices advanced by 14 to 17 RMB per tonne compared to the preceding day. Whilst traders actively presented their offers, steelmakers procured strictly on an as-needed basis, resulting in a scarcity of market inquiries and a largely muted overall physical transaction environment.
